description: A resident reports that their trash was not picked up on the scheduled collection day.

nodes.task_description: Identify the resident's address and confirm their scheduled collection day.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the resident's address and that today was their collection day.

nodes.task_description: Check for any known service disruptions or delays in the area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the system and finds no reported disruptions.

nodes.task_description: Create a service request for a special pickup and inform the resident it will be collected the next business day.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully logs the missed pickup and provides a clear resolution timeline.
